resources.string: Swipe down, tap the tile. Your GPS is instantly shared with nearest hospitals and police — before you even speak.
Our 500m highway grid counts passing vehicles in real time. 47 cars through NH44 KM152? That bridge is NOT collapsed.
GPS updates every 30 seconds. No camera. No ML. Pure GPS math — light enough to run all day on any Android phone.
GPS monitoring · 1%% battery · tap for emergency actions
ResQnow needs precise location to identify your highway, KM marker, and send it to emergency services. Without this, the app cannot help you.
SMS permission lets ResQnow automatically send your GPS location to nearest hospitals during an emergency — no typing needed.
Call permission enables one-tap 112 dialling from the notification, even from the lock screen.
